must_detect.matched_text: Scope: we process personal data (as defined under the PDPA) of employees, directors, candidates, vendors, and investors for financing, ESG/climate reporting, regulatory disclosure to the Siam Securities Commission, and cross-border contracting.

Purposes include payroll and benefits, supplier due diligence, whistleblowing management, cyber incident response, drafting offering materials, and evaluating a pilot tokenization of renewable credits and receivables.

MNPI handling: non-public information (e.g., unannounced sustainability-linked financing, draft crypto wallet integration for employee benefit tokens) is subject to information barriers, insider lists, and blackout windows prior to BGX announcements.

Retention: insider list entries (names, roles, timestamps) are retained for 5 years after the relevant BGX disclosure; cybersecurity logs for 365 days; recruitment records for 1 year unless longer retention is consented or required by law.

_label_tier_note: TH Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. _strict_reconciliation.basis: TH Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
